item.title: If Only Someone Had Listened to Her Last Words
item.description: A true crime story centered on a victim’s final words and the missed warning signs that followed.

item.title: A personal story shaped by family
item.description: A reflective true-crime story about the hardest moments to share and how they shaped a family.

item.title: 9-Year-Old Found Alive After 17 Days in Bunker
item.description: A 9-year-old is found alive after 17 days held in a bunker, according to the source title and description.

item.title: A teacher’s lies changed her life at 15
item.description: A true crime story about a 15-year-old whose life changed after her teacher’s lies, and the strength she showed over 38 days.

item.title: Mom Went Viral on Reddit, Then Lives Changed
item.description: A true crime case that began with a viral Reddit post and led to major changes in one family’s life.

media:content.media:title: Mom Went Viral on Reddit, Then Lives Changed
media:content.media:description: A true crime case that began with a viral Reddit post and led to major changes in one family’s life.

item.title: Teen Survives Family Tragedy
item.description: A teen is left as the lone survivor after witnessing her family’s end, in a true crime case centered on loss and survival.

media:content.media:title: Teen Survives Family Tragedy
media:content.media:description: A teen is left as the lone survivor after witnessing her family’s end, in a true crime case centered on loss and survival.

item.title: Jennifer’s Story of Survival
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares Jennifer’s survival story in a respectful, concise look at a difficult true-crime case.

item.title: A Teen's 38-Day Ordeal
